zip.name: Zip
zip.tagline: Connect the numbers in a single stroke

subtitle.guest: Log in for the daily challenge and rankings.

errors.register: The account could not be created.

locked.description: You already played today's daily challenge. Come back in {{countdown}} for a new challenge.

unplayable.description: This game will be available soon.

puzzleGate.error: We could not load the puzzle. Try again in a few seconds.

pinpointGame.tagline: Guess the category that connects the clues.
pinpointGame.hint: Each wrong answer reveals another clue.

rules.chooseOption: Guess the category by choosing an option from the list.
rules.wrongReveals: Each incorrect answer reveals one additional clue.
rules.hintReveals: Use Hint to reveal one additional clue (+10 s).

crosswordGame.tagline: Complete the words that cross in the grid.
crosswordGame.hint: Select a clue or cell and type a letter.

rules.select: Choose an across or down clue to highlight it in the grid.
rules.write: Type one letter per cell; shared letters work for both words.
rules.complete: Complete every clue to solve the crossword.
rules.hint: Use Hint to reveal one letter (+10 s).

wendGame.tagline: Find 5 hidden words among the letters in a straight line.
wendGame.hint: Drag in a straight line: horizontal, vertical, or diagonal (no zigzag).

rules.find: There are 5 words hidden among filler letters: find them by dragging in a straight line (horizontal, vertical, or diagonal), without zigzagging.
rules.form: Each path must form one of the words in the list.
rules.cross: Some words may cross by sharing a letter, like a crossword; the rest are filler letters.
rules.hints: Letter hint reveals the next correct letter (+10 s). Definition hint shows a word's definition (+5 s).
rules.definitions: When you complete the puzzle, you will see each word's definition below its name.

queensGame.tagline: One crown per row, column, and color; none may touch.
queensGame.hint: Tap once to mark ✕, then again for a crown.

rules.objective: Your goal is to have exactly one 👑 in every row, column, and colored region.
rules.marks: Tap once to place ✕ and twice to place 👑. Use ✕ to mark where a 👑 cannot go.
rules.touching: The 👑 cannot touch, not even diagonally.

zipGame.tagline: Connect the numbers in a single stroke.
zipGame.hint: Start at 1 and drag to connect the numbers in order, filling every cell.

rules.start: Start at number 1 and draw a path to the highest number, in order.
rules.fill: You must visit every cell on the board.

tangoGame.tagline: Three ☀️ and three 🌙 per row and column; never three in a row.
tangoGame.ruleError: A board rule is currently broken.

rules.balance: Every row and column must contain three ☀️ and three 🌙.
rules.runs: There cannot be three identical symbols in a row.
rules.relations: = means the cells must match; × means they must be opposite.
rules.hint: Use Hint to reveal one correct cell (+10 s).

sudokuGame.tagline: Use 1 through 6 without repeats in a row, column, or box.
sudokuGame.hint: Tap a cell, then a number on the keypad below.

rules.fill: Complete the grid using numbers from 1 to 6.
rules.unique: No number may repeat in a row, column, or box.
rules.fixed: Shaded cells are fixed and cannot be edited.
rules.input: Tap a cell, then a number on the keypad below to fill it.

patchesGame.tagline: Complete every shape to fill the grid.
patchesGame.hint: Tap a colored cell and drag to paint its shape; drag over it to erase.

legend.title: Complete every shape to fill the grid
legend.size: If a shape contains a number, it must have that size.

rules.paint: Tap a colored cell and drag to paint its shape.
rules.shape: Every shape must have the indicated form and, if it has a number, that exact size.
rules.erase: Drag over painted cells to erase them.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.error: The leaderboard could not be loaded.
leaderboard.empty: No times have been recorded yet.
leaderboard.personalError: Your results could not be loaded.
leaderboard.personalEmpty: You have not played this game yet.

dailySummary.title: Your summary today
dailySummary.error: Your summary could not be loaded.

rankingMessage.daily: Your time was submitted to the ranking.
rankingMessage.demo: Log in and play the daily challenge to compete.
